steps.title: Use slope-intercept form
steps.content: A linear function with slope $m$ and $y$-intercept $b$ has the form $f(x) = mx + b$. Here $m = 51$ and the line passes through $(0,0)$, so $b = 0$.

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content:
$$f(x) = 51x + 0 = 51x$$
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
